title: 无标题文章
summary: PSA: the official Anthropic GitHub org is github.com/anthropics (plural "s") not the lucky but slightly disturbing zombie shooter github.com/anthropic if you're installing official Claude plugins or skills and 404ing... now you know. 's' doing some heavy lifting there.
content:
PSA: the official Anthropic GitHub org is github.com/anthropics (plural "s")

not the lucky but slightly disturbing zombie shooter github.com/anthropic

if you're installing official Claude plugins or skills and 404ing... now you know. 's' doing some heavy lifting there.
